title: Annotated Tag Release and Verification
description: The project is ready for release. You need to create a proper annotated tag `v2.0.0` on the current HEAD of `main` with a meaningful release message, then verify the tag exists and points to the right commit.
objective: An annotated tag `v2.0.0` must exist pointing to the HEAD of `main`. The tag must have a tag message (not a lightweight tag). The tag must be pushed to `origin`. The tag object type must be `tag` (not `commit`).
hints: `git tag -a v2.0.0 -m "Release 2.0.0: ..."` creates an annotated tag with a message.
Lightweight tags (`git tag v2.0.0` without `-a`) point directly to a commit object. Verify your tag with `git cat-file -t v2.0.0` and make sure it prints `tag`.
`git push origin v2.0.0` pushes the tag to origin specifically.
